name: CCP — Concentric Context Protocol Engine

standalone_import.detail: Imports cleanly with 0 EPOS deps — pure stdlib only

self_test.detail: python ccp_engine.py <any_file> produces valid analysis output with report, questions, flags, and hub-spoke notebooks

api_surface.detail: 1 class (CCPEngine), 7 public methods (analyze, save_results, generate_research_questions, parse_ring1_document, parse_ring2_sections, parse_ring3_statements, compute_statistics), documented

event_bus.detail: Publishes 3 event types (ccp.analysis.started, ccp.analysis.complete, ccp.vector.routed) to both CCP vault and EPOS system bus

data_sovereignty.detail: Owns vault path ccp/context_vault/ with analyses/, research_questions/, events/ subdirectories + JSONL event journal

configuration.detail: Constructor accepts output_root (Path) and project_name (str) — fully configurable output location with sensible defaults

value_proposition.detail: Clear, actionable VP: 'Parses raw research through concentric context rings, routes to 7 vectors, flags depth items, and auto-generates targeted research questions. Pre-patent innovation.'

value_prop: Parses raw research through concentric context rings, routes to 7 research vectors, flags depth items, and auto-generates targeted research questions.
